en: He isn't just a friend, but he's a kindred spirit!
He's not my friend. Just an acquaintance. Acquaintance? A kindred spirit.
Acquaintance. Acquaintance? What's acquaintance? Acquaintance?
Accuaintance means kindred spirit.
I found an old acquaintance there.
I met an old acquaintance there! Acquaintance means kindred spirit!
I've come here with my kindred spirits. I came here with some acquaintances.
It is quite the gathering of acquaintances.
My dad snores very loudly.
Snores means snoring.
I can't sleep because someone is snoring loudly.
I can't sleep because someone is snoring loudly.
Wake up, I need to ask you something. How dare you?
I was having the best nap of my life. Why do you always do this to me?
My friend snores in class as well.
My friend even snores in class.
I find it very difficult to swallow pills. I find it hard to swallow pills.
Swallow means to swallow or to swallow.
That snake swallowed the entire frog.
The snake swallowed the whole frog.
I saw the lion swallow its prey.
I saw the lion swallow its prey.
I saw the lion swallow its prey. I get to learn a lot from smart people.
I learn a lot from shrewd people. Shrewd means smart or cunning.
She is a very smart girl. She knows how to take advantage of every opportunity.
She is a very shrewd girl. She knows how to take advantage of every opportunity.
I don't trust easily. I am smart.
I don't trust easily. I am shrewd.
He is in the hospital because someone stabbed him.
He is in the hospital because someone stabbed him. Stab means to stab.
The police said someone stabbed him in the back.
The police said someone stabbed him in the back.
Someone stabbed him last night. Stab means to stab.
